fields.summary: Specifies options for creating an XPS document.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` controls the rendering quality and encoding behavior
when creating an XPS (XML Paper Specification) document via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.CreateXps*>. Set the desired DPI and other
properties before passing the struct to the factory method.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 300,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};

using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var doc = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
using var canvas = doc.BeginPage(595, 842);
canvas.DrawColor(SKColors.White);
doc.EndPage();
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether images may be embedded without PNG encoding.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> to allow non-PNG image encodings in the document; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots per inch (DPI) used when rasterizing content in the XPS document.
fields.value: The resolution in dots per inch.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The value to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all option fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.returns: A hash code based on all option fields.
